name: Lakes Golf Simulator
address: 1123 US Hwy 10 Suite 2, Detroit Lakes, MN 56501
about: Lakes Golf Simulator offers a fully automated, unstaffed golf simulation facility open 24/7, 365 days a year. Access is granted via a PIN code after an online booking, allowing for flexible play without staff assistance. The venue is equipped with two simulator bays and features premium golf technology for both members and the public. Golfers can choose between a pay-as-you-go model or join a membership plan to access free and discounted reservations.
why_golfers_like_it: Private, unstaffed environment for intimate play
Membership and pay-as-you-go options for various budgets
Facility rentals available for group gatherings

food_and_drink.notes: BYO food allowed; convenience store next door or delivery options available. Keep food and drinks off the turf.
BYOB policy mentioned; no alcohol served on-site.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify club rentals, so it's recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, you can bring your own food and drinks or have them delivered. A convenience store is also next door. Keep all food and drinks off the turf.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It takes approximately 1 hour per person to complete an 18-hole round. For groups, it's recommended to reserve 1 hour per person.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue allows kids and can accommodate group gatherings, making it suitable for families.
